title: Mastering the 360-Degree Sweep in Modern T20 Cricket
excerpt: Learn the mechanical layout and footwork drills required to execute the reverse sweep and paddle scoop effectively.
content:
To score runs consistently in modern T20 cricket, batters must build a 360-degree range. The sweep, reverse sweep, and scoop shots force captains to dismantle traditional field settings. In this guide, Coach Sandeep Dahad reviews the key mechanical checkpoints:

1. Low center of gravity
2. Early head alignment over the ball
3. High-to-low hand speed.

Read our coaching program details for net schedule slots.
author: Coach Sandeep Dahad

title: Fast Bowling Mechanics: Perfecting the Outswinger Release
excerpt: A deep dive into wrist positions, seam alignments, and runway speeds to bowl the perfect outswinger.
content:
The outswinger is the ultimate weapon for any fast bowler. Generating consistent swing requires perfect synergy between your wrist release and the seam angle. Here are the core drills we practice at the Sandeep Dahad Cricket Foundation:

1. Seam pointed towards first slip (15-degree tilt)
2. Strong back-spin wrist flick on release
3. Consistent follow-through towards the batsman.

Book a private consultation for video stance analysis.
author: Coach Sandeep Dahad
